title: chrysocyathus brevistylus
intro:
Chrysocyathus brevistylus, also known as Chrysocolla, is a plant-based mineral specimen, though I have found an alternative plant which is a flowering plant, though I couldn't find more on it, however I found Chrysocolla's alternative plant, a type of flowering plant which is also referred to as 'Chrysocolla' plant, though it's actually called Chrysocyathus brevistylus, is actually a member of the family Asteraceae.

Chrysocyathus brevistylus has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, though I can't say what they are. 

Its health benefits are said to include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, though I couldn't find any evidence to support this claim.
